title: Furtadoa mixta
taxonomy: Furtadoa mixta is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to South America. Furtadoa mixta is a part of the genus Furtadoa, which consists of several plant species. The classification of Furtadoa mixta places it within the class Magnoliopsida, which includes the majority of flowering plant species. Furtadoa mixta's classification is further defined by its order Myrtales.

intro: Furtadoa mixta is a plant species native to Brazil, commonly known as a medicinal plant due to its rich pharmacological properties.
